section_name: Acquisition of Public Interest in Private Road
chapter_title: Acquisition of Pub. Interest in Private Rd. by Certain Counties
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 281. Acquisition of Pub. Interest in Private Rd. by Certain Counties
##### § 281.002 — Acquisition of Public Interest in Private Road

A county may acquire a public interest in a private road only by:

    (1) purchase;

    (2) condemnation;

    (3) dedication; or

    (4) a court’s final judgment of adverse possession.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: A county may acquire a public interest in a private road only by:
a court’s final judgment of adverse possession.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
